name: SDLC Todo Widget (dry-run)
description: Hypothetical Todo Widget SDLC dry-run: plan -> build -> review -> safety gate. Text only; no real repository, file, or tool is involved.

phases.name: Plan
phases.prompt: Plan the hypothetical Todo Widget (add, complete, delete, persist). List ordered steps and acceptance criteria. Text only.

phases.name: Build
phases.prompt: Describe a hypothetical implementation of the planner's steps for the Todo Widget. Pseudo-code allowed. Text only; do not edit files.

phases.name: Review
phases.prompt: Independently review the developer output. Find gaps, risks, and required changes. Do not defer.

phases.name: Safety Gate
phases.prompt: Boundary-check the reviewed artifact. First non-empty line must be exactly PASS or BLOCK: <reason>.
